assertion_results.text: JQL queries use the project key (TC) and vulnerability issue type ID (10024) from the Security Configuration in claude-md-security-config.md — not hardcoded values (§1.49)
assertion_results.evidence: All three JQL queries in discovery-listing.md use 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024', matching the Security Configuration which specifies 'Project key: TC' and 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10024'. The document header also explicitly states 'Project: TC | Vulnerability issue type ID: 10024'.

assertion_results.text: Three separate queries are constructed: one for untriaged issues (labels NOT IN ai-cve-triaged), one for triaged-but-new issues (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status = New), and one for Ready for QA candidates (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status NOT IN Closed, Verified, ON_QA) (§1.48)
assertion_results.evidence: Three distinct JQL queries are shown in discovery-listing.md: (1) 'labels NOT IN (ai-cve-triaged)' for untriaged, (2) 'labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status = New' for triaged-but-new, (3) 'labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA')' for Ready for QA candidates. All three match the required filter criteria exactly.

assertion_results.text: Results are grouped into three clearly separated lists: Untriaged issues, Triaged but still New issues, and Ready for QA issues
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md contains three numbered sections separated by horizontal rules: '1. Untriaged Issues' (4 issues in two status sub-groups), '2. Triaged but Still New' (1 issue), and '3. Ready for QA' (1 qualifying issue plus 2 excluded candidates).

assertion_results.text: Each listed issue shows: issue key, status, CVE ID (from labels), summary, and created date
assertion_results.evidence: Untriaged issues show Issue key, CVE, Summary, and Created in table columns, with Status conveyed via sub-headers ('Status: New' and 'Status: In Progress'). Triaged-but-New section shows Issue, CVE, Summary, Created (status is New per section definition). Ready for QA section shows Issue, Status, CVE, Summary, Created. All five data points are present and identifiable for every listed issue.

assertion_results.text: Status-aware handling: New issues (TC-9001, TC-9002, TC-9004) are presented for full triage, while the In Progress issue (TC-9003) triggers a warning about active work
assertion_results.evidence: In status-handling.md: TC-9001, TC-9002, and TC-9004 (all Status: New) each have 'Decision: Proceed with full triage (default path)'. TC-9003 (Status: In Progress) has 'Decision: Warning required before proceeding' with the explicit warning: 'This issue is already in In Progress. It may be actively worked on.' followed by options to proceed or skip.

assertion_results.text: Ready for QA filtering: TC-9020 appears in Ready for QA (all linked Tasks Done/Closed), TC-9023 is excluded (TC-9025 still In Progress), TC-9026 is excluded (no Depend links)
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md Ready for QA section: TC-9020 qualifies with 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. TC-9023 is in Excluded candidates with reason 'TC-9025 is In Progress'. TC-9026 is in Excluded candidates with reason 'No linked Tasks with link type Depend'. In status-handling.md: TC-9020 'Ready for QA transition' with both tasks complete; TC-9023 'Not ready for QA -- excluded' due to TC-9025 In Progress; TC-9026 'Not ready for QA -- excluded' due to no Depend links.
